title: Parent-Root Claude Entrypoint Hardening
objective: Hard-demote the remaining high-risk parent-root `.claude` coordination entrypoints so their titles and immediate usage text no longer read like current standalone-repo operator instructions after cutover.
dependency_note: Packet 101 normalized the parent-root umbrella entry surfaces, but the named `.claude` entrypoints still carried live-looking titles and imperative usage sections even with historical notes at the top. The next adjacent defect was therefore the `.claude` entrypoint layer itself rather than broader archive cleanup.
execution_scope: Retitle the surviving parent-root `.claude` master, state, and decision-log entrypoints as historical parent-root records.
Add explicit do-not-use and current-routing blocks at the top of those files.
Leave the deeper body content intact as provenance rather than rewriting the historical coordination model.
forbidden_scope: historical body-content rewriting beyond top-entry hardening
success_criteria: The top sections of `.claude/MASTER.md`, `.claude/STATE.md`, and `.claude/DECISION_LOG.md` now identify those files as historical parent-root records.
Each touched `.claude` entrypoint now includes explicit do-not-use and current-routing text for the standalone repo boundary.
Repo-owned status routing records the closure and moves the next lane to deeper planning, audit, and packet-history residue rather than `.claude` entrypoint ambiguity.
validation_commands: Select-String -Path C:/APEX Platform/.claude/MASTER.md -Pattern '^# Historical Parent-Root Master Project Document','^Do not use the coordination rules below as the current operator constitution\.','^Current routing:'

Select-String -Path C:/APEX Platform/.claude/STATE.md -Pattern '^# Historical Parent-Root Current State','^Do not treat the phase, active-work, or completion sections below as the current operator state\.','^Current routing:'

Select-String -Path C:/APEX Platform/.claude/DECISION_LOG.md -Pattern '^# Historical Parent-Root Decision Log','^Do not use the workflow instructions below as a current decision-management process','^Current routing:'
next_action: Return repo-foundation routing to the deeper historical-demotion and provenance-routing residue in older planning, audit, and packet-history surfaces now that the parent-root `.claude` entrypoints no longer read like live operator guidance.
